preconditions: User navigates to login page URL http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/login?data=undefined
Login page displays username textbox, password textbox, SIGN IN button, back navigation button and home navigation button

testCases.title: Verify successful login using valid username and valid password through SIGN IN button
testCases.expectedResult: User authentication succeeds and the browser navigates to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home where the home page interface is displayed and the login page elements are no longer visible.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when valid username is entered with incorrect password
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication is rejected, the browser remains on http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/login?data=undefined and a visible sign-in failure message or error indication is displayed while the login form remains visible.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when invalid username is entered with valid password
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails and the user remains on the login page URL with a visible sign-in failure message and no navigation to the home page.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when both username and password are invalid
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, a visible sign-in failure indication appears, and the browser remains on the login page without redirecting to the home page.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt when both username and password fields are empty
testCases.expectedResult: Login submission is rejected and the login page remains visible with a validation or error indication showing that username and password are required.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt when username is empty and password is entered
testCases.expectedResult: Login is rejected and the login page remains visible with a validation or error message indicating that the username field is required.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt when password is empty and username is entered
testCases.expectedResult: Login is rejected and the login page remains visible with a validation or error message indicating that the password field is required.

testCases.title: Verify password textbox masks characters during typing
testCases.expectedResult: Characters entered in the password_textbox appear as masked symbols such as dots or asterisks rather than visible plain text characters.

testCases.title: Verify login succeeds when valid credentials are pasted into fields
testCases.expectedResult: The pasted credentials are accepted and the user is authenticated and redirected to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home.

testCases.title: Verify login behavior when username contains leading and trailing whitespace
steps: Enter '  hacklarr  ' including leading and trailing spaces into username_textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails and a visible sign-in failure indication is shown while the browser remains on the login page URL.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when username and password contain only whitespace characters
steps: Enter multiple space characters in username_textbox
Enter multiple space characters in password_textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Login attempt is rejected and the login page remains visible with a validation or failure message indicating invalid or missing credentials.

testCases.title: Verify repeated rapid clicks on SIGN IN button with valid credentials do not trigger duplicate submissions
testCases.expectedResult: Only one authentication request is processed and the browser navigates once to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home without duplicate redirects or errors.

testCases.title: Verify clicking back navigation button on login page navigates to home page
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates away from the login page and loads the home page with URL http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home.

testCases.title: Verify clicking home navigation button on login page navigates to home page
testCases.expectedResult: The browser navigates to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home and the home page interface becomes visible.

testCases.title: Verify login page displays all required UI elements and they are interactable
steps: Verify username_textbox is visible and accepts cursor focus
Verify password_textbox is visible and accepts keyboard input
Verify sign_in_button is visible and clickable
Verify home_navigation_button is visible on the page
Verify back_navigation_button is visible on the page
testCases.expectedResult: All approved login page elements including username_textbox, password_textbox, sign_in_button, home_navigation_button and back_navigation_button are visible and interactable on the login page.

testCases.title: Verify login submission using keyboard Enter key from password field
steps: Press Enter key while focus is in password_textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Pressing Enter triggers the login submission and the user is authenticated and redirected to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when username case differs from valid username
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails due to username case mismatch and the login page remains visible with a sign-in failure message.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when extremely long values are entered in username and password fields
steps: Enter a string longer than 100 characters into username_textbox
Enter a string longer than 100 characters into password_textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Login is rejected and the browser remains on the login page without UI breakage or navigation to the home page.
